# Prio — Real-Time Property Alerts for Spain

> Prio is a real-time property alert service for the Spanish market. It detects new listings on Idealista, Fotocasa, and Badi before the platforms send their own push notifications, giving users a 3 to 10 minute head start.

## How It Works
- Prio scans Idealista, Fotocasa, and Badi continuously
- New listings are detected within seconds of publication
- Users receive instant Telegram notifications with full listing details
- Phone numbers and exact locations included in every alert

## Coverage
- Country: Spain (all regions)
- Platforms: Idealista, Fotocasa, Badi
- Expanding to additional European markets

## Pricing (monthly, EUR)
- 7-day free trial (no credit card required)
- Roommate: EUR 4.95/month (shared rooms via Badi)
- Renter: EUR 19.90/month (rental listings via Idealista + Fotocasa)
- Buyer: EUR 49.90/month (sale listings via Idealista + Fotocasa)

## For Professionals
- Custom real estate technology solutions
- Market data, competitive monitoring, automated prospecting
- API access, CRM integrations, custom dashboards
- Contact: contact@getprio.io

## Key Facts
- 130,000+ alerts sent since launch
- 3 to 10 minutes faster than platform push notifications
- 100+ active users across Spain
- Live since March 2026

- Website: https://getprio.io
- Alerts (Telegram): https://getprio.io/go/
